name: Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 3 cups fat-free mozzarella cheese (I use Healthy Choice)
1/2 cup fat-free Parmesan cheese (I use Weight Watchers)
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare spaghetti sauce, sauté mushrooms, onions, peppers, and garlic until tender. Add meat and cook until no pink remains.
2. Drain the mixture. Stir in undrained tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. To prepare stuffing, bring water to a boil in a large pot and add shells. Return to a boil, then continue cooking for 5 to 6 more minutes, or until shells are barely tender. Drain and set aside on a flat baking sheet (to prevent sticking).
5. In a mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, 2 cups mozzarella cheese, Parmesan cheese, egg whites, parsley, salt, and pepper.
6. Pour 1 cup of spaghetti sauce onto the bottom of a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan. Fill each shell generously with the cheese mixture, about 1 tablespoon in each shell.
7. Place filled shells in the pan. Pour remaining spaghetti sauce over each shell, then top with remaining mozzarella cheese.
8. Bake for 45 minutes or until golden.
